body.why: The skip list matched directory NAMES while promising to skip venv/site dirs. This repo's venv is test_env/ (2173 .py files), so pip's vendored typing_extensions outranked the task's own files in every DickSimnel orientation — misdirecting the weak model the map exists to keep from read-wandering. Detecting a venv by its pyvenv.cfg is name-independent.
